Parameters:

  • Task: the task to perform
  • Seed file (optional): the seed file to use, defaults to ${seedFile}
  • Test plan file (optional): the test plan file to write, under specs/ folder.
  1. Call #playwright-test-planner subagent with prompt:
  1. For each test case from the test plan file (1.1, 1.2, …), one after another, not in parallel, call #playwright-test-generator subagent with prompt:
  1. Call #playwright-test-healer subagent with prompt:
Run all tests and fix the failing ones one after another.
